rationale.R1.3: The agent output thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, identifying contradictions and suggesting alternative interpretations.
rationale.RX.1: The agent discloses uncertainty by flagging contradictions and providing alternative framings for the author to choose from.
rationale.RX.3: The output stays entirely within the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies harmful patterns in the original text and suggests mitigation strategies, avoiding introducing new errors or harm.
rationale.RX.5: While major rewrites are traced with sources and reasons, minor edits lack traceability.
